items.title: Study the pattern
items.body:
Workbook lesson 14: Conversation 14. Read the sentences, listen, and repeat.

Examples:
• Do you want to sell your bicycle?
• 21- Do you buy ice cream every day? / candy / chocolate.
• St. Patrick
• St. Patrick brought Christianity

items.text: Do you want to sell your bicycle?

items.prompt: I don’t want to sell my bicycle.
